    A

    addEffect(CombatEffect) - Method in class logic.unit.BaseUnit
    Applies a combat effect to the unit.
    addLog(String) - Method in class view.LogPanel
    Appends a new text message to the bottom of the log panel.
    animatePath(List<Tile>) - Method in class view.UnitView
    Queues a sequence of logical tiles for the unit to visually traverse over time.
    application - package application
     
    apply(BaseUnit) - Method in interface logic.effect.CombatEffect
    Executes the specific logic of this combat effect upon the designated target.
    apply(BaseUnit) - Method in class logic.effect.DamageEffect
    Executes the damage application logic against the specified target.
    apply(BaseUnit) - Method in class logic.effect.LingeringEffect
    Applies the effect to the target unit.
    apply(BaseUnit) - Method in class logic.effect.PushEffect
    Executes the push logic against the specified target.
    applyEffects(Tile, Tile) - Method in interface logic.unit.strategy.tactic.AttackStrategy
    Executes the combat logic, including damage calculation, defense mitigation, and applying any specialized passive triggers or status effects to the target.
    applyEffects(Tile, Tile) - Method in class logic.unit.strategy.tactic.CloseAttack
    Executes the offensive logic of the attack.
    applyEffects(Tile, Tile) - Method in class logic.unit.strategy.tactic.CloseFireAttack
    Executes the combat logic, layering environmental and status effects.
    applyEffects(Tile, Tile) - Method in class logic.unit.strategy.tactic.DebuffAttack
    Executes the combat logic, combining damage with a dynamic defense debuff.
    applyEffects(Tile, Tile) - Method in class logic.unit.strategy.tactic.LineAttack
    Executes the offensive logic of the attack.
    applyEffects(Tile, Tile) - Method in class logic.unit.strategy.tactic.LobbedAttack
    Executes the combat logic for the lobbed projectile.
    applyEffects(Tile, Tile) - Method in class logic.unit.strategy.tactic.LobbedFireAttack
    Executes the combat logic, layering environmental ignition over artillery damage.
    applyEffects(Tile, Tile) - Method in class logic.unit.strategy.tactic.PointBlankAttack
    Executes the combat logic with a conditional damage multiplier.
    applyEffects(Tile, Tile) - Method in class logic.unit.strategy.tactic.PushAttack
    Executes the combat logic, combining immediate damage with a displacement effect.
    applyEffects(Tile, Tile) - Method in class logic.unit.strategy.tactic.PushRadialAttack
    Executes the combat logic for every tile within the radial blast.
    applyEffects(Tile, Tile) - Method in class logic.unit.strategy.tactic.RadialAttack
    Executes the combat logic for any unit caught in the shockwave.
    applyEffects(Tile, Tile) - Method in class logic.unit.strategy.tactic.SwarmAttack
    Executes the combat logic with a conditional "Swarm" multiplier.
    AquaMaiden - Class in logic.unit.skill
    A terrain-dependent passive skill that dynamically alters a unit's attack power.
    AquaMaiden() - Constructor for class logic.unit.skill.AquaMaiden
    Default constructor for initializing a base instance of the Aqua Maiden skill.
    AquaMaiden(BaseUnit) - Constructor for class logic.unit.skill.AquaMaiden
    Parameterized constructor for initializing the skill alongside a specific unit.
    ArmorShatter - Class in logic.unit.skill
    A global, flag-based passive skill that amplifies defense-reducing effects.
    ArmorShatter() - Constructor for class logic.unit.skill.ArmorShatter
    Default constructor for initializing the Armor Shatter skill.
    attacker() - Method in record class logic.structure.AttackPlan
    Returns the value of the attacker record component.
    ATTACKER - Enum constant in enum class controller.RoundPhase
    The phase where the Attacking team is granted control to move and execute actions with their units.
    ATTACKER - Enum constant in enum class logic.common.Team
    Represents the attacking faction.
    attackIndex() - Method in record class logic.structure.AttackPlan
    Returns the value of the attackIndex record component.
    ATTACKING - Enum constant in enum class controller.TurnAction
    The active unit is currently in combat mode.
    AttackPlan - Record Class in logic.structure
    A lightweight record representing a prepared combat action.
    AttackPlan(BaseUnit, int) - Constructor for record class logic.structure.AttackPlan
    Creates an instance of a AttackPlan record class.
    attackPower() - Method in record class logic.structure.UnitStats
    Returns the value of the attackPower record component.
    attackRange() - Method in record class logic.structure.UnitStats
    Returns the value of the attackRange record component.
    AttackStrategy - Interface in logic.unit.strategy.tactic
    Defines the combat and targeting behavior for a unit on the game board.
    attackType() - Method in record class logic.structure.UnitStats
    Returns the value of the attackType record component.

    B

    BagView - Class in view
    Represents a horizontal UI container (a "bag" or roster) that displays a list of available units.
    BagView(Consumer<UnitStats>) - Constructor for class view.BagView
    Constructs a new BagView with the specified click event handler.
    BASE_TILE_HEIGHT - Static variable in class util.Config
    The base rendering height of a single isometric tile in pixels.
    BASE_TILE_WIDTH - Static variable in class util.Config
    The base rendering width of a single isometric tile in pixels.
    BaseUnit - Class in logic.unit
    Represents a base entity on the game board.
    BaseUnit(UnitStats, Team) - Constructor for class logic.unit.BaseUnit
    Constructs a new BaseUnit using the provided stat blueprint and assigns it to a team.
    begin() - Method in class view.scene.BoardScene
    Initializes the rendering loop, centers the camera on the board, and officially begins visual updates for the game scene.
    begin() - Method in class view.scene.CharacterSelectionScene
    Initializes scene-specific logic such as playing the background music and entrance sound effects.
    begin() - Method in class view.scene.GameScene
    Executes the initialization or startup logic specific to this scene.
    begin() - Method in class view.scene.MapSelectionScene
    Initializes the scene's behavior by starting the background music loop.
    begin() - Method in class view.scene.MenuScene
    Begins the scene by setting up the UI components and playing the menu background music.
    Berserk - Class in logic.unit.skill
    A reactive passive skill that rewards the unit with stacking buffs whenever an allied defender falls in battle.
    Berserk() - Constructor for class logic.unit.skill.Berserk
    Default constructor for initializing the Berserk skill.
    BOARD_COLS - Static variable in class util.Config
    The total number of columns on the game board.
    BOARD_ROWS - Static variable in class util.Config
    The total number of rows on the game board.
    BoardScene - Class in view.scene
    Represents the main gameplay scene where the actual board, units, and HUD are displayed.
    BoardScene(Stage, Runnable) - Constructor for class view.scene.BoardScene
    Constructs the main game board scene, initializing all UI layers, HUD components, and binding them to the GameManager's state.
    BreachingShot - Class in logic.unit.skill
    An offensive passive skill designed to dismantle enemy fortifications.
    BreachingShot() - Constructor for class logic.unit.skill.BreachingShot
    Default constructor for initializing the Breaching Shot skill.
    burn() - Method in class logic.board.Tile
    Executes the recurring burning logic for this tile.
    burn() - Method in interface logic.common.Flammable
    Executes the recurring logic that happens while the object is on fire.
    burn() - Method in class logic.unit.BaseUnit
    Defined by the Flammable interface.
    BurnEffect - Class in logic.effect
    Represents a specific lingering combat effect that applies continuous fire/burn damage to a unit over a set number of turns.
    BurnEffect(int, int) - Constructor for class logic.effect.BurnEffect
    Constructs a new BurnEffect with the specified damage amount and duration.

    C

    calculateDeployableTiles() - Method in class controller.GameManager
    Computes the subset of tiles currently legal for deployment and highlights them.
    Camera - Class in view
    Represents a 2D camera viewport for a grid-based (likely isometric) game board.
    Camera() - Constructor for class view.Camera
    Default Constructor for Camera
    CAMERA_PADDING - Static variable in class util.Config
    The buffer distance in pixels kept on the screen edges to prevent panning entirely off the map.
    canAct() - Method in class logic.unit.BaseUnit
    Checks if the unit is legally allowed to execute a combat action this turn.
    canMove() - Method in class logic.unit.BaseUnit
    Checks if the unit is legally allowed to perform a movement action this turn.
    canPlace(BaseUnit) - Method in class logic.board.Tile
    Evaluates whether a specific unit can be legally placed on or moved into this tile.
    CharacterSelectionScene - Class in view.scene
    Represents the pre-game character selection screen.
    CharacterSelectionScene(Stage, BiConsumer<List<UnitStats>, List<UnitStats>>) - Constructor for class view.scene.CharacterSelectionScene
    Constructs the Character Selection Scene.
    checkAndTriggerAllAttackerPlans() - Method in class controller.GameManager
    Iterates through all currently pending attacker plans and immediately forces their execution if their target area satisfies trigger conditions, removing them from the queue.
    checkGameEnd() - Method in class controller.GameManager
    Verifies the primary victory conditions (unit wipes, town destruction, or round limits) to determine if the match has concluded.
    checkTurnEnd() - Method in class controller.GameManager
    Assesses whether the active team has exhausted all available unit actions, automatically ending the phase if true.
    clamp(double, double, int, int) - Method in class view.Camera
    Restricts the camera's coordinates to ensure the game board does not pan entirely off-screen.
    CloseAttack - Class in logic.unit.strategy.tactic
    Implements a cardinal-direction melee combat strategy.
    CloseAttack() - Constructor for class logic.unit.strategy.tactic.CloseAttack
    Default constructor for CloseAttack.
    CloseFireAttack - Class in logic.unit.strategy.tactic
    An elemental variant of the melee strike that combines physical damage with fire magic.
    CloseFireAttack() - Constructor for class logic.unit.strategy.tactic.CloseFireAttack
    Default constructor for CloseFireAttack.
    CombatEffect - Interface in logic.effect
    Represents a discrete, applyable effect that occurs during or after combat.
    Config - Class in util
    A central configuration class that holds global constants for the game.
    Config() - Constructor for class util.Config
    Default Constructor for Config
    controller - package controller
     
    CoordinateOutOfBoundException - Exception Class in util
    Thrown to indicate that a requested grid coordinate (row or column) falls outside the valid boundaries of the game board.
    CoordinateOutOfBoundException() - Constructor for exception class util.CoordinateOutOfBoundException
    Constructs a new CoordinateOutOfBoundException with a default detail message stating that the coordinate is out of bounds.
    CoordinateOutOfBoundException(int, int, int) - Constructor for exception class util.CoordinateOutOfBoundException
    Constructs a new CoordinateOutOfBoundException with a formatted detail message that displays the invalid value alongside the allowed minimum and maximum bounds.
    CoordinateOutOfBoundException(String) - Constructor for exception class util.CoordinateOutOfBoundException
    Constructs a new CoordinateOutOfBoundException with the specified detail message.
    createGrid(String) - Static method in class logic.factory.GridFactory
    Constructs a new 18x18 grid and applies a terrain layout based on the provided map ID.
    createUnit(String, Team, int, int) - Static method in class logic.factory.UnitFactory
    Creates a new unit instance based on a registry ID and attempts to place it on the board.

    D

    DamageEffect - Class in logic.effect
    Represents an instant combat effect that inflicts direct damage on a target unit.
    DamageEffect(int, BaseUnit) - Constructor for class logic.effect.DamageEffect
    Constructs a new DamageEffect with the specified base damage and source unit.
    dead() - Method in class logic.unit.LeaderUnit
    Triggers the morale penalty across the board when the leader falls in battle.
    DeathRailway - Class in logic.unit.skill
    A strategic, one-time use passive skill that provides a massive mobility boost to the team's slowest units.
    DeathRailway() - Constructor for class logic.unit.skill.DeathRailway
    Default constructor for initializing the Death Railway skill.
    DebuffAttack - Class in logic.unit.strategy.tactic
    Implements a tactical debuff combat strategy that fires a projectile in a straight line.
    DebuffAttack() - Constructor for class logic.unit.strategy.tactic.DebuffAttack
    Default constructor for DebuffAttack.
    DEFENDER - Enum constant in enum class controller.RoundPhase
    The phase where the Defending team is granted control to move and execute actions with their units.
    DEFENDER - Enum constant in enum class logic.common.Team
    Represents the defending faction.
    DefenseBuffEffect - Class in logic.effect
    Represents a lingering combat effect that temporarily increases a unit's defense power.
    DefenseBuffEffect(int, int) - Constructor for class logic.effect.DefenseBuffEffect
    Constructs a new DefenseBuffEffect with the specified buff amount and duration.
    defensePower() - Method in record class logic.structure.UnitStats
    Returns the value of the defensePower record component.
    DefenseReductionEffect - Class in logic.effect
    Represents a lingering combat effect that temporarily reduces a target unit's defense by a specified percentage.
    DefenseReductionEffect(int) - Constructor for class logic.effect.DefenseReductionEffect
    Constructs a new DefenseReductionEffect with a default defense reduction of 50%.
    DefenseReductionEffect(int, double) - Constructor for class logic.effect.DefenseReductionEffect
    Constructs a new DefenseReductionEffect with a custom defense reduction percentage.
    Describable - Interface in logic.common
    A contract for game entities, items, or elements that possess a UI-friendly display name and a more detailed lore or mechanical description.
    deselectTile() - Method in class controller.GameManager
    Clears the current tile selection and drops the action mode.
    dispose() - Method in class util.SoundManager
    Safely halts all audio processing and clears memory caches.
    distanceTo(Tile) - Method in class logic.board.Tile
    Calculates the Manhattan distance (grid steps) between this tile and another tile.
    distanceTo(GridPoint) - Method in class util.GridPoint
    Calculates the Manhattan distance between this point and another GridPoint.
    DRAGON_NEST_ENV - Static variable in class logic.factory.GridRegistry
    Identifier for the Dragon Nest environment map.
    DRAGON_NEST_MAP - Static variable in class logic.factory.GridRegistry
    Identifier for the Dragon Nest terrain map.
    dropActionMode() - Method in class controller.GameManager
    Cancels the current action mode (resets to NONE) and updates tile highlights.

    E

    EIGHT_DIRECTIONS - Static variable in class util.Config
    Array of coordinate offsets [row, col] representing all 8 compass directions.
    endCurrentPhase() - Method in class controller.GameManager
    Explicitly forces an end to the current player-controlled phase and jumps to the next logic state.
    EndTurnBtn - Class in view
    Represents a custom-styled JavaFX Button used to end the current player's turn or phase.
    EndTurnBtn() - Constructor for class view.EndTurnBtn
    Constructs a new EndTurnBtn.
    Enlightenment - Class in logic.unit.skill
    An offensive passive skill that empowers the unit against supernatural threats.
    Enlightenment() - Constructor for class logic.unit.skill.Enlightenment
    Default constructor for initializing the Enlightenment skill.
    equals(Object) - Method in class logic.board.Tile
    Compares this tile to another object for equality.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class logic.structure.AttackPlan
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class logic.structure.UnitStats
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in class util.GridPoint
    Compares this GridPoint to the specified object.
    execute() - Method in record class logic.structure.AttackPlan
    Executes the combat logic encapsulated in this plan.
    executeMove(Tile, Tile, boolean) - Method in class controller.GameManager
    Determines the optimal path and executes the movement for a unit from its current position to a destination, notifying the UI to animate the pathing.
    extinguish() - Method in class logic.board.Tile
    Forces the fire on this tile to go out.
    extinguish() - Method in interface logic.common.Flammable
    Forces the fire on the object to go out, immediately ending any active burning states or ongoing fire effects.
    extinguish() - Method in class logic.unit.BaseUnit
    Extinguishes flames on the unit by purging any BurnEffects from its lingering effects queue.

    Calculates the potential paths the projectile can take.

    Calculates all valid destination tiles for a seafaring unit.

    Grid - Class in logic.board
    Represents the main game board, managing the 2D spatial arrangement of Tiles and tracking all BaseUnits currently active in the game.

    Constructs a new Grid initialized with dimensions defined by BOARD_ROWS and BOARD_COLS from the global configuration.

    ignite() - Method in class logic.unit.BaseUnit

    Checks if this terrain type completely blocks entity movement (e.g., an impassable wall).
    isBuffActive() - Method in class logic.unit.skill.AquaMaiden
    Checks whether the Aqua Maiden attack buff is currently applied to the unit.
    isBurning() - Method in class logic.board.Tile
    Checks if this tile is currently actively burning.

    Checks if the object is currently actively on fire.

    Checks the lingering effects queue to determine if the unit is currently on fire.
    isDead() - Method in class logic.unit.BaseUnit

    isDeploymentMode() - Method in class controller.GameManager
    Checks if the game is currently in the pre-game deployment phase.
    isExecuting() - Method in class controller.GameManager
    Checks if the game is currently executing forced actions (moving units, resolving attacks, or ending).

    Checks if this effect has completed its lifespan.
    isFlammable() - Method in class logic.board.Tile
    Checks if this tile is capable of catching fire.
    isFlammable() - Method in enum class logic.board.TileType
    Checks if this terrain type is capable of catching fire.

    Checks if the object is susceptible to catching fire.
    isFlammable() - Method in class logic.unit.BaseUnit
    Evaluates if this unit is susceptible to catching fire based on its composition and passive resistances.

    LOOP_ALL - Enum constant in enum class util.LoopMode
    Iterates through a defined playlist.
    LOOP_SELF - Enum constant in enum class util.LoopMode
    Continuously loops the currently playing audio track indefinitely.

    O

    omaeWaMouShindeiru() - Method in class logic.unit.BaseUnit
    Instantly kills the unit by dropping its hit points to exactly zero.
    ONATTACK - Enum constant in enum class logic.unit.skill.PassiveType
    Triggers immediately when the unit executes an attack action.
    ONCE - Enum constant in enum class util.LoopMode
    Plays the audio track exactly once and stops when it reaches the end.
    ONDEFENDERDEATH - Enum constant in enum class logic.unit.skill.PassiveType
    Triggers specifically when a unit belonging to the Defender team is killed.
    onInitialApply(BaseUnit) - Method in class logic.effect.BurnEffect
    Applies the initial burn effect to the target unit.
    onInitialApply(BaseUnit) - Method in class logic.effect.DefenseBuffEffect
    Applies the initial defense buff to the target unit.
    onInitialApply(BaseUnit) - Method in class logic.effect.DefenseReductionEffect
    Applies the initial defense reduction to the target unit.
    onInitialApply(BaseUnit) - Method in class logic.effect.LingeringEffect
    Defines the specific logic to execute the very first time this effect is applied to a target.
    ONPHASESTART - Enum constant in enum class logic.unit.skill.PassiveType
    Triggers automatically at the very beginning of a round phase (e.g., when the Attacker Phase or Defender Phase starts).
    ONPOSITIONCHANGE - Enum constant in enum class logic.unit.skill.PassiveType
    Triggers whenever the unit's coordinates on the grid change.

    remove(BaseUnit) - Method in class logic.effect.BurnEffect
    Executes the cleanup logic when the burn effect expires or is cleansed.
    remove(BaseUnit) - Method in class logic.effect.DefenseBuffEffect
    Executes the cleanup logic when the buff expires or is dispelled.
    remove(BaseUnit) - Method in class logic.effect.DefenseReductionEffect
    Executes the cleanup logic when the debuff expires or is cleansed.
    remove(BaseUnit) - Method in class logic.effect.LingeringEffect
    Defines the cleanup logic to execute when this effect is removed from the target (either because its duration reached zero or it was cleansed/dispelled).
    render(Camera) - Method in class view.GridView
    Renders the grid to the screen by updating the position and size of every tile.
    resetFlags() - Method in class view.TileView
    Clears all temporary visual state flags (selected, reachable, hovered, etc.) simultaneously.
    resetGame() - Method in class controller.GameManager
    Resets the entire internal state of the game.
    resetTurnAction() - Method in class logic.unit.BaseUnit
    Re-enables the unit's ability to move and attack for a new turn.
    RESOLUTION - Enum constant in enum class controller.RoundPhase
    The automated end-of-round phase where pending attacks are executed, lingering status effects (like burn or poison) apply their damage, and dead units are cleaned up from the board.
    resumeBgm() - Method in class util.SoundManager
    Resumes the paused background music, smoothly fading its volume back up.

    Tile - Class in logic.board
    Represents a single discrete cell or coordinate space on the game board's grid.

    Constructs a new empty Tile at the specified coordinates with a default terrain type of TileType.PLAIN.

    TileType - Enum Class in logic.board
    Defines the various types of terrain available on the game board.

    TileView(Tile) - Constructor for class view.TileView
    Constructs a new TileView bound to the provided logical tile instance.
    toggleActionMode() - Method in class controller.GameManager
    Toggles the active mode of the selected unit between MOVING and ATTACKING, provided the unit still has the capability to perform the respective action.
    toggleSelection(Tile) - Method in class controller.GameManager
    Handles the logic for selecting, deselecting, and setting action modes when a user interacts with a specific tile on the board.

    Returns a string representation of the tile's current state, useful for debugging.

    Represents the current action mode or state of a selected unit during a player's turn.

    TurnPanel() - Constructor for class view.TurnPanel
    Constructs a new TurnPanel.

    Updates and reveals the panel based on the selected tile.
